case_title: LOPEZ, CHRISTINE MARIE vs. LOWENTHAL, LARRY IND&DBA GILMAN SCREENS & KITCHENS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, CHRISTINE MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT LOWENTHAL, LARRY IND&DBA GILMAN SCREENS & KITCHENS LACHMAN RESOURCE GROUP OF NEVADA, INC.
